title: ThinkNode M6: identify LoRa/GPS chips and pin mapping
description: Before board definition: (1) Check ELECROW docs/schematic for LoRa chip (SX1262 vs LR1110), (2) Identify GPS chip, (3) Find pin mapping in Meshtastic variants/ or by inspection, (4) Check solar/battery monitoring interface (I2C fuel gauge? ADC?). Blocks all other M6 work.
notes: Commit: d4c0f4f47. LoRa chip identified as SX1262 (not LR1110), GPS as L76K, full pin mapping extracted from Meshtastic variant.h (CS=P1.12 etc, GPS UART on P0.2/P0.3). Battery uses ADC (no I2C gauge), solar supported. Board definition can now proceed. Unblocks downstream M6 work.
close_reason: Identification complete from Meshtastic variant: SX1262 + L76K GPS with explicit pins; ADC battery/solar confirmed. Added to notes with commit d4c0f4f47. Unblocks board def and parent epic.
